text: Milmedika находится по другому адресу!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310

translations.sr: Milmedika se nalazi na drugoj adresi!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
translations.sr_cyrl: Milmedika се налази на другој адреси!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
translations.en: Milmedika is located at a different address!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
translations.ru: Milmedika находится по другому адресу!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
translations.de: Milmedika befindet sich an einer anderen Adresse!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
translations.tr: Milmedika farklı bir adreste bulunuyor!! Jadranski put Ulica XIII br.5, 85310
